events.producer: Event bus, durable queues, DLQ, redrive
events.orderingExpectation: per organisation and idempotency key; no cross-tenant ordering guarantee
events.retryPolicy: worker retries until maxAttempts then DLQ; webhook deliveries retry with backoff
events.dlqPolicy: dead-letter row stores event id, tenant, type, attempts, last error; operator redrive creates a new idempotency key
events.retention: platform_events retained for history/readiness according to data retention policy
events.auditRelationship: EventRedriven audit event for redrive; source mutation audit stays with producer capability
